nasb.text: He made loops of blue on the edge of the outermost curtain in the first set; he did likewise on the edge of the curtain that was outermost in the second set.

esv.text: He made loops of blue on the edge of the outermost curtain of the first set. Likewise he made them on the edge of the outermost curtain of the second set.

cnv.text: 在第一組相連的幔子末幅的邊緣上，他做藍色的鈕扣；在另一組相連的幔子末幅的邊緣上，他也照樣作。

ccb.text: 然后在每幅大幔子边缘钉上了蓝色的扣环，
